display.purpose: Auth titles, major screen headers (28sp bold).

title.purpose: Subsection headers, empty state titles (20sp bold).

body.purpose: Message text, list previews, form content (14sp).

shadows.name: shadow-subtle
shadows.purpose: Offset layer under raised bubbles and primary buttons only.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for press, reveal, and modal entrance.

motion.name: duration-press
motion.purpose: Button press scale and tab pulse.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Wider margins, 640dp content cap, wider bubbles.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: sign in, send, confirm. Solid copper pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C8875A; color: #F2F4F7; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 52px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A66D45; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8875A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Dialog cancel, ghost actions on raised surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #1A2028; color: #F2F4F7; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 48px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #2A323D; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #222932; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8875A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E05A5A, #C44A4A); color: #F2F4F7; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 52px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.12s; } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E05A5A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sent Message Bubble
components.description: Outgoing chat message with asymmetric tail corner.
components.css: .ds-bubble-sent { background: #141C24; color: #F2F4F7; padding: 10px 14px 20px; max-width: 280px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #2A323D; border-radius: 20px 20px 6px 20px; box-shadow: 1px 2px 0 #0A000000; }

components.name: Received Message Bubble
components.description: Incoming chat message, one surface step lighter.
components.css: .ds-bubble-received { background: #1A2028; color: #F2F4F7; padding: 10px 14px 20px; max-width: 280px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #2A323D; border-radius: 20px 20px 20px 6px; box-shadow: 1px 2px 0 #0A000000; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search bar on home and friend lists. 12dp radius, not pill.
components.css: .ds-input-search { background: #12161C; color: #F2F4F7; border: 1px solid #2A323D; border-radius: 12px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #7F8996; } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: none; border-color: #C8875A; }

components.name: Active Filter Pill
components.css: .ds-pill-active { display: inline-block; background: #C8875A; color: #F2F4F7; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Flat Dock Nav
components.description: Edge-to-edge bottom navigation with hairline top border.
components.css: .ds-dock-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; background: #12161C; border-top: 1px solid #2A323D; min-height: 56px; padding: 0; } .ds-dock-tab { background: none; border: none; color: #7F8996; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; min-height: 48px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-dock-tab--active { color: #C8875A; } .ds-dock-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8875A; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Dialog Card
components.description: Alert dialog container on sunken surface.
components.html:
Confirm action

This cannot be undone.
components.css: .ds-dialog { background: #12161C; border: 1px solid #2A323D; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px; max-width: 320px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-dialog-title { color: #F2F4F7; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-dialog-body { color: #8A939F; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Empty State
components.html:
No messages yet

Start a conversation to see it here.
components.css: .ds-empty { text-align: center; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-empty-title { color: #F2F4F7; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-empty-subtitle { color: #8A939F; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A dark communication surface for frequent, low-light use. Deep void canvas, warm-tinted neutral surfaces, crisp white type, and one copper accent that marks action without Messenger-blue fatigue. Chat bubbles, call controls, and feed rows share one flat material language: tone steps, hairline borders, no floating glass chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Void canvas #0B0D11 with warm-tinted surface steps
Plus Jakarta Sans; weight-driven hierarchy; sentence case
Flat edge-to-edge dock navigation with top hairline
Touch targets ≥48dp; WCAG AA on dark surfaces
User-facing copy in strings.xml; accessibility labels on icon controls

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Copper appears on ≤10% of any screen. Green and red are status-only, never decorative accents.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Size Rule
rules.body: Secondary hierarchy uses Ink Muted and Medium weight before dropping below 14sp.

rules.name: The Flat-Canvas Rule
rules.body: The app background stays Canvas Void. Elevated elements rise through surface tokens, not blur or floating pills.

dos: Do use Canvas Void as universal background.
Do keep one copper accent for primary actions, active tabs, and focus rings.
Do use divider lists on home, search, settings, and friend requests.
Do use Ink Muted for timestamps and metadata; Ink Whisper only where contrast passes on its surface.
Do maintain 48dp touch targets on primary controls.
Do respect reduced motion and keep content visible without animation gates.
Do externalize copy and accessibility labels to strings.xml.
donts: Don't use Facebook/Messenger bright blue chrome or cluttered feed density.
Don't use AI slop: purple neon gradients, decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, side-stripe borders, identical card grids, hero-metric blocks.
Don't use floating glass pill navigation (legacy Midnight Slate).
Don't wrap every list row in a card.
Don't flatten all text to Ink Primary without muted hierarchy.
Don't gate content visibility on entrance animations.
Don't hardcode user-facing strings or contentDescription literals in layouts or Java.
